title: Polygala guantanamana
intro: Polygala guantanamana is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, native to Cuba. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Polygala guantanamana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are thought to be responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Polygala guantanamana is used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into tinctures and capsules, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
